input.user_input: Explain the mailbox rule in contract formation and whether it applies to email acceptances.

actual:
The **mailbox rule** (also known as the postal rule) is a default principle in contract law that determines exactly when an acceptance of an offer becomes legally effective. 

Here is an explanation of how the rule works traditionally and how it applies to modern electronic communications like email.

### The Traditional Mailbox Rule
